products.description:
Straight from Bandai Tamahsii Nations´s Figuarts ZERO Metallic Touch comes this highly detailed PVC statue.

The statue stands approx. 25 cm tall and comes with base in a colored window box packaging.

products.name: Jujutsu Kaisen FiguartsZERO PVC Statue Yuji Itadori 19 cm
products.description:
Yuji Itadori, from "Jujutsu Kaisen," joins FiguartsZERO! This fixed-pose figure captures the moment he releases his devastating Black Flash attack, using translucent parts to accentuate the drama!

Set Contents: Main Body (with effects)

products.name: Star Wars Meisho Movie Realization Action Figure Ronin Jango Fett 17 cm
products.description: Timed for the upcoming new Star Wars film come three consecutive new releases in the MEISHO MOVIE REALIZATION series! The first is Ronin Jango Fett. Includes his trademark pair of guns, which can be attached to his legs. Includes 8 optional pairs of hands, two guns, and a kunai blade.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure SSJ 3 Son Goku 16 cm
products.description: Five years after being offered as a web exclusive, Super Saiyan 3 Son Goku joins S.H.Figurarts with an all new sculpt and tons of new features! It looks great when displayed with the Tamashii EFFECT Energy Aura Yellow Ver. (sold separately). The highly posable figure includes five pairs of optional hands, three optional expressions, and a custom stand.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Son Gohan (Battle Clothes) 10 cm
products.description:
SON GOHAN -BATTLE CLOTHES- from "Dragon Ball Z," joins S.H.Figuarts. Features four expression options, including shouting, grimacing, laughing, and straight-face. Optional hair parts let you replicate his dynamic hairstyle. Also, continuing the tradition started with the S.H.
Figuarts portrayals of Dodoria and Zarbon (sold separately), it comes with a glowing Namekian Dragon Ball (three star)!

Set Contents: Main body, Four optional expression parts, Three left and four right optional hands, Optional hair parts, Optional chest parts,
Glowing Namekian Dragon Ball (three star)

products.name: Godzilla S.H. MonsterArts Action Figure Godzilla 2023 1.0 16 cm
products.description:
Godzilla Series From the latest "Godzilla-1.0", GODZILLA [2023] appears on S.H.MonsterArts! Based on the 3D data used in the film, Yuji Sakai sculpted, colored, and produced the figure. The figure was also directly supervised by director Takashi Yamazaki to reproduce Godzilla as he appeared in the film!

Set Contents: Main Body

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Zarbon 16 cm
products.description:
Zarbon from "Dragon Ball Z" joins S.H.Figuarts! Includes glaring, shouting, and grimacing expression options, which in concert with removable ears and Scouter let you re-create your favorite scenes. It also includes a Namekian Dragon Ball (two-star version)!

Set Contents: Main Body, Three right and two left optional hands, Three optional expressions, Scouter, Hair option for Scouter, Optional hair part, Namekian Dragon Ball (two star)

products.name: Sailor Moon Proplica Replicas Transformation Brooch & Disguise Pen Set Brilliant Color Edition
products.description:
This high-quality, prop-grade replica PROPLICA TRANSFORMATION BROOCH & DISGUISE PEN SET -Brilliant Color Edition- is a must have for Sailor Moon fans. The brooch plays the transformation sounds and character voices. Both of them illuminated with LED. Recreate your favorite scenes!

Sizes:

- Brooch 7 cm
- Pen 16 cm

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Android 20 13 cm
products.description:
ANDROID 20, from "Dragon Ball Z," joins S.H.Figuarts! Included expression parts let you re-create his initial "left-glancing" appearance, with additional shouting and sneering options. An optional head lets you display the figure without a hat, so you can relive your favorite scenes! A broken right arm option and controller are included as well. And an optional expression of pain for the S.H.Figuarts SUPER SAIYAN FULL POWER SON GOKU (sold separately) lets you replicate the heart-pounding confrontation between the two!

Set Contents: Main Body, Four left and three right optional hands, Three optional expression parts, Optional right arm, Optional head, Controller

Bonus: S.H.Figuarts SUPER SAIYAN FULL POWER SON GOKU expression option part

The God Warrior pledging allegiance to Hilda, the giant Thor comes to the EX series! Reproduce the huge warrior from the series with this completely remodeled body featuring die-casting! products.description: A new line of stylishly squashed figures born from the pride of TAMASHII NATIONS, the Figuarts series! Figuarts mini is proud to debut with a series of characters from the Evangelion movies. Ayanami Rei, Shikinami Asuka Langley, and Mari Makinami Illustrious are set to arrive with the grand opening of "Evangelion: 3.0+1.0" on June 27, 2020, wearing plugsuits from the movie. Ikari Shinji and Nagisa Kaworu will also join, wearing plugsuits from "Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo." Each comes with optional arms and a stand.

products.description:
An assembly set of a brick wall that you can build in various configurations to expand your display possibilities! Re-create famous scenes or make your new ones -- the opportunities are endless. Combine it with the Brown Ver. (sold separately) for even more variations. The assembled wall stands 220mm high at its tallest. Note that the set does not include figures. The set includes wall parts(large)×2, wall parts A(small)×2, wall parts B(small)×2, display stand part, rooftop part, wall support part A, wall support part B, a display support clip and arm.

Figures are not included.

products.name: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Pan 9 cm
products.description:
From "Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero," Pan joins S.H.Figuarts! Optional expressions and accessories let you replicate your favorite scenes from on-screen. A PET bottle and hand accessory let you re-create Pan's training with Piccolo! And what's more, it includes a new optional head for the S.H.Figuarts Ultimate Gohan SUPER HERO figure (sold separately.)

Set Contents: Main Body, Three pairs of optional hands, Three optional expressions, Optional head, PET bottle (x2)

Bonus Part: Son Gohan head (with optional expression)

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H.Figuarts Action Figure Set Porunga & Dende -Come Forth, Genuine Shenron!!- 42 cm
products.description:
PORUNGA & DENDE LUMINOUS DRAGON BALL SET, as seen in "Dragon Ball Z," joins S.H.Figuarts! Porunga's titanic size s accentuated by dramatic posability and optional hands that let you re-create your favorite scenes! And an optional head and hands for Dende let you capture his summoning pose! The sculpting, colors, and posability of S.H.Figuarts combine with the sounds and light-up in this amazing set. An NFC reader is built into the stand, and Porugna and Dende are tagged with chips. Place Dende atop the stand and the seven Dragon Balls illuminate, re-creating the dramatic scene of his summoning! And the set includes many recorded lines from both characters that you can play back as well.

Set Contents: Porunga figure, One ogtional left hand and two optional right hands for Porunga, Dende figure, Set of optional hands for Dende, Optional head for Dende, Namekian Dragon Balls (1-7 star versions), Porunga Stand, Dragon Ball Stand, Type-3 Batteries (Sold Separately)

Total height: 42 cm
(with stand and crest),
Height: 28 cm(with stand)

Gamma 2 from "Dragon Ball Super: SUPER HERO" is now available from S.H.Figuarts! Reproduce the impressive poses from the trailer, for example, by using the exchangeable parts for facial expressions, hands, etc., included as accessories! The gun by the hip is kept in the holster using the exchangeable parts. You can also enjoy the two ways the gun can be held with the exchangeable hand parts! And have even more fun reproducing scenes from the movie with the included head part with glasses on and the cloak for use with S.H.Figuarts Ultimate Gohan Super Hero (sold separately)! Combine this with Gamma 1 (sold separately) and you can line up the two characters from "Dragon Ball Super: SUPER HERO"!

products.description:
From the Universe Survival Saga of "Dragon Ball Super," the mighty Android 18 joins S.H.Figuarts! Standing 135mm tall and made of ABS and PVC plastic, you can display it in dynamic scenes with the many included options and effect parts. Includes a hand-in-pockets option to re-create her classic pose.Or display alongside the S.H.Figuarts Android 17 -Universe Survival Saga- figure (sold separately) to re-create dramatic scenes from on screen!

Set Contents:

- Main Body
- Five pairs of optional hands
- Three optional expression parts
- Optional hair part
- Energy bomb effect
- Hands-in-pockets parts

products.name: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Gamma 1 14 cm
products.description:
Gamma 1, from "Dragon Ball Super: SUPER HERO," joins S.H.Figuarts! Numerous optional expressions and accessories let you re-create dramatic scenes. Two guns are included: a holstered version and a drawn version he can hold in his hand. The set also includes an optional head and two expressions for the S.H.Figuarts Ultimate Gohan SUPER HERO figure (sold separately.) Combine these with the bonus parts included with the S.H.Figuarts Gamma 2 (sold separately) to re-create your favorite scenes from the film!

Set Contents:

Main Body, Three pairs of optional hands, Four optional heads, Gun, Crossed arm parts

Bonus Parts:
Super Saiyan Son Gohan Head, Super Saiyan Son Gohan expression parts x2

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Kyewi 14 cm
products.description:
From the Frieza Saga of "Dragon Ball Z," KYEWI joins S.H.Figuarts! Optional parts let you re-create your favorite scenes, with "shouting," "fearful," "defeated," and even a "cowering before Frieza" faces included! In conjunction with the "defeated" face, a bonus expression and pair of hands for the S.H.Figuarts VEGETA - 24000 POWER LEVEL - (sold separately) are included, letting you replicate the "dirty fireworks" scene from the series!

Set Contents: Main Body, Two pairs of optional hands, Four optional expressions, Removable Scouters (normal and fearful versions)

[Bonus Parts] S.H.Figuarts VEGETA - 24000 POWER LEVEL - expression part ,S.H.Figuarts VEGETA - 24000 POWER LEVEL - hands (L/R)

products.name: Dragon Ball S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Son Goku Super Hero 14 cm
products.description:
From the TV anime series "Dragon Ball" comes this great and fully articulated action figure from Tamashii Nations S.H. Figuarts' series.

The figure is approx. 14 cm tall and comes with additional accessories in a window box.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Yamcha 15 cm
products.description:
From the "CELL" saga of "DRAGON BALL Z," YAMCHA -EARTH'S FOREMOST FIGHTER- joins S.H.Figuarts! Optional expression parts put you right in the action. It even includes a "defeated" face, plus a bonus arm option for the ANDROID 20 figure (sold separately), so you can re-create dramatic scenes featuring the two characters.

Set Contents: Main Body, Three pairs of optional hands, Three optional expression parts

Bonus Parts: Optional arms for ANDROID 20 figure (sold separately)

products.name: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Piccolo 16 cm
products.description:
Piccolo as seen in the upcoming 2022 film "DRAGON BALL SUPER : SUPER HERO" joins S.H.Figuarts, featuring design and colors as seen in the teaser trailer!

Set Contents: Main Body, Two optional heads, Two left and three right optional hands

products.description:
ANDROID 21 (Lab Coat) from "Dragon Ball FighterZ" DLC joins S.H.Figuarts! Features four expression options, including glaring, shouting,
and grimacing faces. Separately customizable eyes and crossed-arm parts let you replicate his distinctive poses, and accentuate them with
an included effect part!

Set Contents: Main body, Five pairs of optional hands, Four optional expression parts, Optional crossed arm part, Effect part
